<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\Formatter; /** * Reflector formatter interface. */ interface ReflectorFormatter { /** * @param \Reflector $reflector */ public static function format(\Reflector $reflector): string; }
